creator: ooburai@gmail.com
text:
I would like to report that the Asus M2A-VM would appear to work just fine out of the box.  There are some ACPI AE_NOT_FOUND errors (ACPI-0438: *** Error: Looking up [LNKC] in namespace, AE_NOT_FOUND) but other than this everything else seems to be detected without trouble.  On board Ethernet works as does the integrated video.  Sound not tested.  Please update the http://www.freebsd.org/platforms/amd64/motherboards.html page to include this board as it would appear to be a reasonable low cost option and no AMD690 chipsets are on the list yet.

How-To-Repeat: 1) buy an Asus M2A-VM
2) install FreeBSD
3) type 'dmesg'
4) smile
